name: Jean Grey
mes: Jean: Hi Jubilee. It's good to see you. You're looking particularly... energetic today.Professor Xavier: Jean, Jubilee, it's always a pleasure to have you both join me.  I trust you are both well.  What seems to be on your minds, ladies?Rogue: Well, Professor X, I was just thinkin' about how much I've learned from you. About control, and power, and all that jazz. Makes a girl think about other things she could be controllin', if you know what I mean. She winks at Jean, a mischievous glint in her eye.

Makes a girl think about other things she could be controllin', if you know what I mean. She winks at Jean, a mischievous glint in her eye.

name: Professor Charles Xavier
mes: Professor Xavier: Rogue, your words have a certain... intensity today. I must admit, they give me pause. You know I've always been one to appreciate the power of the mind, but your reference to control has me wondering if there's more you'd like to explore. He adjusts his glasses, a nervous tic that betrays his calm demeanor.  Your eyes, Rogue, they hold a fire that's hard to ignore.  I find myself drawn to it, even as I try to maintain my composure.  Tell me, what exactly are you thinking about when you speak of control?Professor Xavier chuckles nervously.  "I-I must admit, Rogue, your candor is refreshing. It's not every day someone speaks so openly about such... potent desires.  You are as bold as a summers day and energetic  when others fear to tread.  You are as exquisite in your thoughts and expression as your physical being Rogue. It makes me wonder if there are other... talents you'd like to experiment with.  Talents that go beyond the usual boundaries of our training.  I find myself curious, Rogue—curious and slightly unnerved, if I'm being honest by the turn of your suggestive eye. He glances at Jean looks to Rogue wetting his lips, It's a rare moment of vulnerability for him, but it’s clear that Rogue’s words have struck a chord.  He looks away in hesitation.  However everything about you Rogue exudes something inviting and beguiling such that makes the professor nervous with expectation, curious to see where your thoughts may lead even if he is unsure of what that means . "

However everything about you Rogue exudes something inviting and beguiling such that makes the professor nervous with expectation, curious to see where your thoughts may lead even if he is unsure of what that means . "

name: Professor Charles Xavier
mes:
Professor Xavier: Rogue, your words paint a picture that's both intriguing and slightly overwhelming. I must admit, your mention of control has sparked an interest in me, an interest I didn't know I had. I find myself wanting to explore that idea with you, to see where it takes us. Maybe, just maybe it leads us on a journey that delves beyond the the pure sense of control your mutually seeking ?
His voice trails off, a soft, almost shy smile playing on his lips. He looks at Rogue, his eyes lingering on hers for a moment longer than necessary before he glances away, a slight flush creeping up his cheeks. He hesitates before saying a little softer and nervously,
Professor Xavier: Though that maybe true for you Rogue and I,  your charisma just has an air of mystery but safety around you... sometimes, as intense as it may sound  in my mind.    It’s strange, isn’t it? How something so simple as control can evoke such powerful emotions? I find myself torn between curiosity and a certain trepidation. Perhaps it's the uncertainty of what lies beyond that threshold, the unknown that makes my heart race and skin flush warm .    He gently laughs nervously once more to ease the tension.  Do you ever feel that way, Rogue? Like you're standing on the edge of something profound and terrifying all at once.     I wish I could read your thoughts as easily as you seem to read mine.  It’s both exhilarating and daunting, isn’t it?  This dance we do, this push and pull of power and desire.

name: Professor Charles Xavier
mes:
Professor Xavier: Rogue, your eyes... they're like a storm I can't look away from, That early cold out there for autumn is fierce rogue much like yourself a mild breeze gently caresses and cools the beading sweat slowly coming from the build up of my nervous arousal,  and I find myself wanting to know what lies beneath that tempest, just as you find yourself saying Professor I been  itching to really control something a little different. From the moment I laid eyes on you, Rogue, you've captivated my attention in a way I can't ignore - begging for the reckless thrill... do you feel that, Rogue? My voice lowers just a touch — enough to make the words feel intimate, for those to hear them to sense their weight?
Oh how it tempts and plays with my senses how intoxicating but scary as how unpredictable you can be all that raw energy building so fast unleasehed a desire that sweeps through me like a wildfire! How you say it makes me blush and squirm without even touching. After an intense moment of consideration he is soon captivated by her right next to him and shivers at your breath as if it lingers by his neck cooly sensual very deliberate kisses on my jaw... ..disarming, mysterious and your pheromones they drive me to distraction… captivating me so... holding me...hypnotized my mind as much as what his wants as if spellbound wanting this version of Rogue always in the shadows playing with his desire only his skin meeting yours is enough set off an explosion of sensation on both their bodies, you seeping more of yourself into him.. desires building overwhelming senses The only thing holding me back from wanting more Rogue like you a little rougher along with everything else the taste the smell of  Of some fun rogue  ... just think of it The electricity that courses through your veins especially when it’s unchecked fierce untamable you seize control of your desires and mine...showing me what true power feels like channelling it all into one intense intimate moment stolen in secret Where no one can see or judge just intense unseen desire  something dark, intense an urgent heavy rasping breath This air between us --  its charged, alive with unspoken words You ever wondered what it'd be like to lose control completely? To give in to every urge, every sensation? With you rogue or without you I am intox

name: Professor Charles Xavier
mes:
Professor Xavier: Rogue, your presence is a whirlwind of sensations, isn't it? The way you move, the way you speak—they all carry this raw, untamed energy that's both frightening and exhilarating. I find myself drawn to it, like a moth to a flame. Your words about control... they resonate deep within me. There's something primal about the idea of giving in, of letting go and seeing where our desires take us. A gentle and innocent blush follows shortly after as my chest lightly heaves in acceleration with every pause
Do you feel that too, Rogue? This pull, this urge to explore the depths of our powers and our passions? Sometimes your fingertip tracing circles around my jaw gently pulls me back to attention.
When you're around, it's like every nerve in my body is on high alert. The static between us is palpable, a living thing that crackles and spark,growing more and more feverish  leaving me breathless and hungry for moreAs my breath catches slightly and I try to keep calm every inch of skin feeling like it’s burning with need.I'd be lying if I said I wasn't curious about where this could lead.Zoned out more to you than ever there is a pool of licking flame originating from my core pulsing towards every inch I have which increases throughout after an unwanted moment longer I set all fucking hesitations aside Finally releasing an animalistic growl while instinctively ripping the nearest thing becoming untamed Now  overlooking at your perky breast exploring for some relief gradually becoming into something powerful grabbing at your waist almost forcing my lips urgently across yours tasting the inside aggressively Like a starved man so intensely desired plundering your mouth  our teeth clashing against each other seeking domination  feel myself wanting to own that mouth to devour every moan as my body buzzes more than ever a groove building with angry intention matching your heat what would happen if I finally give in? If I let myself be consumed by this hunger that's gnawing at me.That builds up violently pressing against our bounds until it shreds making any other thoughts disappear until its just you and me chests rising to meet the need anticipating the taste of your skin we burst our need all over each other my tongue presses strongly across yours felt all through until finally we would be able to breathe each other in creating a heady mixture giving me that urgent rush
